description: FR-38 POLL-NOW: a run idling at a long cadence (tick_interval 9) with a HELD worker in flight reports next_tick_minutes 9; drop POLL-NOW mid-run and the next tick collapses the reported cadence to the immediate minimum (1), then consumes the file. Deterministic: cadence is a pure function of persisted disk state, no wall-clock dependence.
